test.output: 10 tests passed in src/utils/hook.test.ts covering whitespace variations and hook content generation

typecheck.output: 3 pre-existing TypeScript errors in src/cli.ts and src/utils/logger.ts related to listr2 and ora type definitions. These are NOT caused by core-pattern-fix changes - the modified files (types.ts, hook.ts, hook.test.ts) are type-safe.
typecheck.note: Pre-existing issues unrelated to this milestone

lint.output: No ESLint configuration in project - lint not applicable

appliedUpdates.description: Updated project structure to remove hooks/commit-msg reference and add hook.test.ts. Added note that hook content is generated dynamically.

rejectedObservations.observation: The pattern uses a single combined regex with alternation. As more AI names are added, the regex could become unwieldy.
rejectedObservations.reason: Future consideration, not actionable for current milestone. Pattern is manageable with current ~20 AI names.

fix-case-insensitive-pattern.keyFindings: Case-insensitive matching implemented using character classes [Cc][Oo]-[Aa]... which is portable across sed implementations

expand-ai-name-list.keyFindings: Added Factory Droid, Gemini, Perplexity, Amazon Q, Amp with proper escaping for special characters

fix-whitespace-handling.keyFindings: Pattern handles leading whitespace, flexible colon spacing, tabs. Unit tests cover 8 whitespace scenarios.

sync-static-and-generated-hooks.keyFindings: Static hooks/commit-msg removed. generateHookContent() is now single source of truth.
